description: Open manhole on the main walking path. Dangerous for students during rain.
Auto-rickshaw stand blocking the main exit. Traffic congestion during train timings.
Streetlight pole leaning dangerously after heavy winds. Needs immediate inspection.
Water supply has been muddy for the last 3 days. Health risk for residents.
Large potholes caused by coal dampers. Road almost impassable for two-wheelers.
Illegal garbage dumping site created behind the hospital boundary wall.
Drainage overflow onto the street causing a foul smell in the vegetable market.
Stray dogs attacking morning walkers near the school grounds.
Lack of dustbins in the area. Littering is increasing on the temple approach road.
Public toilets are locked and inaccessible for travelers arriving late at night.
Low voltage issues causing damage to domestic appliances for the whole block.
Heavy dust pollution due to lack of water sprinkling on the coal transport route.
Park benches broken and lighting non-functional. Residents feel unsafe after 7 PM.
Incomplete bridge work has left sharp iron rods exposed on the bypass road.
Tree fallen across the residential lane following the thunderstorm last night.
